expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards on the right side of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped mid-content, cutting off game titles (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC... PYRAMIG...'). There is no visible scroll indicator, fade gradient, or affordance to inform users that horizontal scrolling is available.
The top navigation category bar clips the last visible tab label ('Hot Ga...') without any visual indicator of additional tabs, making it unclear to the user that more categories exist.
Game card titles within the visible area use inconsistent font sizing and capitalization styles, creating a visually noisy and unpolished grid layout.
The 'EXCLUSIVE' badge overlaps the top-left corner of each game card without adequate padding or contrast on some cards, potentially reducing legibility.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a missing responsible gaming icon; issue 1 describes a clipped navigation tab label, which is a different UI element and problem.
